description: Composition100% CottonFittingSlimWashCareMachine Wash separately in cold water, use mild detergent. Do not Bleach. Avoid Soaking.Remove promptly. Line Dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do Not Iron Directly on Print/embroidery.A cool green polo t-shirt that looks great on its own or under a sweater.Not too slim, not too loose, this t-shirt's Fit is just perfect. This T-shirt suits formal wear trousers and leisurewear denim jeans, khaki or cargo effortlessly. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
